items.title: S01E01 - The Hawk
items.summary: After experiencing a tragedy on the course, past-his-prime golfer Lonnie Hawkins decides to make one last stand to achieve his career Grand Slam.

infolabels.title: The Hawk
infolabels.plot: After experiencing a tragedy on the course, past-his-prime golfer Lonnie Hawkins decides to make one last stand to achieve his career Grand Slam.

items.title: S01E02 - The Family That Plays Together
items.summary: As the golf world gathers for a tearful farewell, Lonnie infuriates Lance and Stacy by choosing the fairway over the funeral home.

infolabels.title: The Family That Plays Together
infolabels.plot: As the golf world gathers for a tearful farewell, Lonnie infuriates Lance and Stacy by choosing the fairway over the funeral home.

items.title: S01E03 - Roses & Thorns
items.summary: When Lonnie's game begins to waver, Sam helps him reconnect with his roots. Natalie tries to overcome Stacy's smothering presence on the green.

infolabels.title: Roses & Thorns
infolabels.plot: When Lonnie's game begins to waver, Sam helps him reconnect with his roots. Natalie tries to overcome Stacy's smothering presence on the green.

items.title: S01E04 - Tears of a Hero
items.summary: Lonnie's triumphant return to the PGA Tour is dampened by a Danish rival. Lance and Natalie host an engagement party to remember.

infolabels.title: Tears of a Hero
infolabels.plot: Lonnie's triumphant return to the PGA Tour is dampened by a Danish rival. Lance and Natalie host an engagement party to remember.

items.title: S01E05 - The Prison Yard
items.summary: Lonnie lands a magazine cover that leaves his entire circle seething. Sam's past finally catches up with her.

infolabels.title: The Prison Yard
infolabels.plot: Lonnie lands a magazine cover that leaves his entire circle seething. Sam's past finally catches up with her.

items.title: S01E06 - The Genesis Invitational
items.summary: Lonnie, Lance and Golden sow chaos on the course when they're paired for a tournament round. An unwelcome discovery pushes Natalie to her limit.

infolabels.title: The Genesis Invitational
infolabels.plot: Lonnie, Lance and Golden sow chaos on the course when they're paired for a tournament round. An unwelcome discovery pushes Natalie to her limit.

items.title: S01E07 - Vegas
items.summary: With $3 million on the line, father and son go head-to-head in a simulation golf tournament in Vegas — and all bets are off.

infolabels.title: Vegas
infolabels.plot: With $3 million on the line, father and son go head-to-head in a simulation golf tournament in Vegas — and all bets are off.

items.title: S01E08 - The Code
items.summary: In the messy aftermath of the Vegas trip, Lonnie tries to win back Sam's trust, Stacy has complicated feelings and Lance hits rock bottom.

infolabels.title: The Code
infolabels.plot: In the messy aftermath of the Vegas trip, Lonnie tries to win back Sam's trust, Stacy has complicated feelings and Lance hits rock bottom.

items.title: S01E09 - Pebble
items.summary: Lonnie revisits the scene of his worst defeat. Stacy and Golden get down to business. Lance gains an enhanced perspective on his daddy issues.

infolabels.title: Pebble
infolabels.plot: Lonnie revisits the scene of his worst defeat. Stacy and Golden get down to business. Lance gains an enhanced perspective on his daddy issues.

items.title: S01E10 - Pickle
items.summary: Lonnie, Lance and Golden compete for championship glory at the U.S. Open — where the trophy isn't the only thing being chased.

infolabels.title: Pickle
infolabels.plot: Lonnie, Lance and Golden compete for championship glory at the U.S. Open — where the trophy isn't the only thing being chased.
